title: Innovative Tender French Sausages Choux Pastry
description: A plant-based-friendly, fermented French dish featuring Italian fennel sausages in a choux pastry, served in a bamboo tray. This cozy Lyon-inspired recipe is perfect for a dinner gathering.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Add the vegan butter and water to the bowl, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a large rectangle.
Place the Italian fennel sausages in the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around them.
Brush the edges of the dough with the egg replacement and fold the dough over the sausages, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the pastry on a bamboo tray and bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the pastry cool for 5 minutes before serving.
